tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
title: Oops... I Did It Again!

artist: Britney Spears

tabbed by: Saffron :)


capo on the 4th


Intro:
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] 
     Yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah  (2x)[/tab]


Verse1:
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] (rest)        [ch]Am[/ch]
I think I did it again[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
I made you believe were more than just friends (Oh baby)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
It might seem like a crush[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
But it doesnt mean that Im serious[/tab]

Bridge:
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
cause to lose all my senses[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch] 
That is just so typically me[/tab]
Oh baby, baby


Chorus:
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
Oops!...i did it again[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
I played with your heart, got lost in the game[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]
Oh baby, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
Oops!...you think Im in love[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
That Im sent from above[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]
Im not that innocent[/tab]


Verse2:
Am (once and then rest) Am
You see my problem is this
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
Im dreaming away[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
Wishing that heroes, they truly exist[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
I cry, watching the days[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
Cant you see Im a fool in so many ways[/tab]

Talk:
(be silent at first)
Britney, before you go, theres something I want you to have
                                                                 
Oh, its beautiful, but wait a minute, isnt this...? 
[tab]               (start [ch]F[/ch])
Yeah, yes it is[/tab]
[tab]                                                [ch]G[/ch]
But I thought the old lady dropped it into the ocean in the end[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Well baby, I went down and got it for you[/tab]
Oh, you shouldnt have
